description_long: This is a large, urban half-pipe skate ramp constructed primarily from metal and wood, featuring a smooth, curved skating surface and vertical sidewalls. The ramp is adorned with various graffiti artworks, including stylized pandas and expressive faces, giving it a gritty, street-art aesthetic. Both ends of the ramp have elevated platforms with sturdy metal guardrails for safety, allowing skaters to prepare before dropping in. The side panels are made of dark wood planks, contrasting with the light gray skating surface. The structure is robust and designed to withstand heavy use, typical of public skateparks. The overall design is functional yet visually engaging, blending urban art with recreational utility.
description: A large, graffiti-decorated half-pipe skate ramp with metal guardrails and wooden side panels, designed for urban skateparks. The structure features expressive street art and robust construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical face with a large panda graffiti and metal guardrails on top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full curved skating surface, both platforms, and multiple graffiti artworks.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with a different panda graffiti and visible platform guardrails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ramp's curvature, platforms, and additional graffiti details.
